subject: Move master back to the beginning of the year
commit_message:
Move master back to the beginning of the year

Move to 50d29a32cadf7c8c91e3409d8d604cc4852dadb4 to test if we already
had an issue with gating

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Change-Id: I38d491ba09a754a256bfa98a4d045e01eb2f0ca3
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
